videos.headline: North Dakota State QB fakes run finds TE for TD
videos.description: North Dakota State QB Trey Lance fakes the quarterback sneak and dumps it off to this TE Ben Ellefson for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Dakota State QB fakes run finds TE for TD) 2019/09/07
